_schema_notes.coverage: Authoritative schema for all DID formats — DD Form 1664 (pre-2014) and free-text (post-2014 MIL-STD-963C)
_schema_notes.did_format: Set to 'dd_form_1664' or 'free_text'. Determines which fields are expected to be populated.
_schema_notes.963c_compliant: True if the DID was prepared under MIL-STD-963C (2014 or later). False for older DIDs.
_schema_notes.reserved_fields: Fields marked RESERVED are present in one format but not the other. Always include them — set to empty string or empty array when not applicable.
_schema_notes.preparation_instructions: Official MIL-STD-963C name for what was previously called 'requirements'. Contains the numbered sections of the DID. All section numbers are normalized to strictly numeric dot-notation (1, 1.1, 1.1.1). Letter-based source numbering (2.a, 3.1.b) is converted to numeric equivalents (2.1, 3.1.2).
_schema_notes.asterisk: True if the requirement number is followed by * in the source document (conditional requirement).

title: Accident/Incident Report
summary: This Data Item Description details requirements for immediate notification and information regarding major accidents or incidents involving fatalities, disabling injuries, property damage, or impacts to program schedules and equipment safety.
use_relationship:
This report provides the procuring agency with immediate notification and information concerning any major accident/incident (including fire) resulting in any one or more of the following: causing one or more fatalities, or two or more disabling injuries; damaging government property exceeding $10,000; affecting program planning or production schedules; degrading the safety of the equipment under contract, such that personnel injury or property damage may be involved; identifying a potential hazard requiring corrective action.
This Data Item Description contains the format and content preparation instructions for the data product generated by the specific and discrete task requirement as delineated in the contract.
distribution_statement: DISTRIBUTION STATEMENT A: Approved for public release; distribution is unlimited.

preparation_instructions.title: Content.
preparation_instructions.content: Report without delay any serious accident or incident (i.e. explosion, fire, flood, pressure rupture, major malfunction) which will adversely affect capability to meet contractual obligations. The report shall be made by the fastest means, giving the following information.

children.title: Name, organization, telephone number, and location of the contractor and general manager
Name and title of the person(s) reporting
Location of accident/incident, i.e., building number, facility name
Brief summary of accident/incident giving pertinent details including type and quantity of materiel
Casualties (fatalities, disabling injuries, exposed to CBR agents)
Nature of damage; effect on production, operations, training or other activity
Other damage or injuries sustained (public or private)

preparation_instructions.title: Malfunction. If a malfunction of equipment is involved, the following additional information shall be furnished:
